label: false-dup
a: All background job handlers must be idempotent — identical input must produce identical output regardless of how many times the job executes.
b: Failed background jobs are retried up to 3 times with exponential backoff: first retry after 30 seconds, second after 2 minutes, third after 10 minutes. After 3 failures, the job moves to a dead-letter queue for manual review.
reviewer_notes: Complementary, not the same fact: A is the idempotency requirement; B is the retry schedule + DLQ. You can implement one without the other.
